verses.2: but I will send a fire on Moab,
verses.3: and I will cut off the judge from among them,
verses.5: but I will send a fire on Judah,
verses.7: They trample the heads of the poor into the dust of the earth
verses.8: They lay themselves down beside every altar on clothes taken in pledge.
verses.9: Yet I destroyed the Amorite before them,
verses.10: Also I brought you up out of the land of Egypt
verses.11: I raised up some of your sons for prophets,
verses.12: “But you gave the Nazirites wine to drink,
verses.13: Behold, I will crush you in your place,
verses.14: Flight will perish from the swift.
verses.15: He who handles the bow won’t stand.
verses.16: He who is courageous among the mighty
